config.script:
tagPath = self.view.params.tagPath
	tag = tagPath + "/Agent/Analysis"
	
	# Read current value
	currentValue = system.tag.readBlocking([tag])[0].value
	
	# Toggle the value
	newValue = not currentValue
	
	# Write the toggled value back
	system.tag.writeBlocking([tag], [newValue])

transforms.code:
import re
	import system
	
	if not value or value == '':
		headers = ['section', 'content']
		return system.dataset.toDataSet(headers, [['Status', 'No data available']])
	
	try:
		# Recursively decode nested JSON until we get the actual data
		data = value
		max_depth = 20  # Prevent infinite loops
		depth = 0
		
		while isinstance(data, (str, unicode)) and depth < max_depth:
			try:
				decoded = system.util.jsonDecode(data)
				# Check if this is a UNS-style wrapper
				if isinstance(decoded, dict) and 'value' in decoded:
					data = decoded['value']
				else:
					data = decoded
					break
			except:
				# Not valid JSON, we've reached the actual content
				break
			depth += 1
		
		# Now data should be the actual payload
		if isinstance(data, dict):
			# Extract fields
			ts = data.get('timestamp', '')
			line = data.get('line', 'Unknown')
			category = data.get('category', 'Unknown')
			message = data.get('message', '')
		else:
			# If still a string, treat as message
			ts = ''
			line = 'Unknown'
			category = 'Unknown'
			message = str(data)
		
		# Format timestamp
		if ts:
			try:
				ts_clean = ts.replace('Z', '').split('.')[0]
				ts_date = system.date.parse(ts_clean, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss")
				ts_display = system.date.format(ts_date, 'MMM dd, yyyy h:mm a')
			except:
				ts_display = ts[:19] if len(ts) >= 19 else ts
		else:
			ts_display = 'Unknown'
		
		# Extract Status
		status_match = re.search(r'Status:\s*(\w+)', message)
		status = status_match.group(1) if status_match else 'Unknown'
		
		# Extract OEE metrics
		oee_match = re.search(r'OEE:\s*([\d.]+)%\s*\(A:\s*([\d.]+)%\s*\|\s*P:\s*([\d.]+)%\s*\|\s*Q:\s*([\d.]+)%\)', message)
		if oee_match:
			oee = oee_match.group(1)
			availability = oee_match.group(2)
			performance = oee_match.group(3)
			quality_metric = oee_match.group(4)  # Renamed to avoid conflict with quality parameter
		else:
			oee = availability = performance = quality_metric = 'N/A'
		
		# Extract Priority
		priority_match = re.search(r'Priority Level[:\s]*(\w+)', message, re.IGNORECASE)
		priority = priority_match.group(1).upper() if priority_match else 'NORMAL'
		
		# Build dataset
		headers = ['section', 'content']
		rows = []
		
		# Header info
		rows.append(['📊 Overview', ''])
		rows.append(['Timestamp', ts_display])
		rows.append(['Line', line])
		rows.append(['Status', status])
		rows.append(['Priority', priority])
		rows.append(['', ''])
		
		# OEE Metrics
		rows.append(['📈 OEE Metrics', ''])
		rows.append(['Overall OEE', oee + '%'])
		rows.append(['Availability', availability + '%'])
		rows.append(['Performance', performance + '%'])
		rows.append(['Quality', quality_metric + '%'])
		rows.append(['', ''])
		
		# Extract and parse AI Analysis
		ai_section = re.search(r'--- AI ANALYSIS ---\s*(.+)', message, re.DOTALL)
		if ai_section:
			analysis_text = ai_section.group(1).strip()
			
			rows.append(['🤖 AI Analysis', ''])
			
			# Extract numbered items
			items = re.findall(r'(\d+)\.\s*\*\*([^*:]+)\*\*:\s*([^\n]+(?:\n(?!\d+\.|\*\*)[^\n]+)*)', analysis_text)
			
			for num, title, detail in items:
				title_clean = title.strip()
				detail_clean = detail.strip()
				detail_clean = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', detail_clean)
				
				rows.append([str(num) + '. ' + title_clean, detail_clean])
			
			# Extract Additional Note
			note = re.search(r'\*\*Additional Note\*\*:\s*(.+)', analysis_text, re.DOTALL)
			if note:
				note_text = note.group(1).strip()
				note_text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', note_text)
				rows.append(['', ''])
				rows.append(['📝 Additional Note', note_text])
		
		return system.dataset.toDataSet(headers, rows)
		
	except Exception as e:
		headers = ['section', 'content']
		return system.dataset.toDataSet(headers, [
			['❌ Error', str(e)],
			['Decoding Depth', str(depth) if 'depth' in locals() else 'N/A'],
			['Data Type', str(type(data)) if 'data' in locals() else 'N/A']
		])
